description: Drafted the Synexus client proposal directly in Master instead of delegating to a content-generation agent with VOICE.md loaded. David asked whether the handoff was correct — it was not.
correction: Client-facing proposals should be routed through the brand-voice-enforcement skill or a content-generation agent that reads identity/VOICE.md before generating. Master should orchestrate, not free-form client content.
systemic_fix: Add routing rule in agents/routing.md: any client-facing document (proposal, email, case study) must go through brand-voice-enforcement or content-generation agent, not generated directly by Master.
